<!--
  GitHub Copilot reads .github/copilot-instructions.md. Keep the real conventions
  in AGENTS.md; this points there so there's a single source of truth.
-->

Follow the working agreement and conventions in **AGENTS.md** at the repository
root: the build / test / run commands, the code conventions, and the rules —
especially "verify, don't assume" and "no secrets or personal data in the repo."
